policy.default: Muon for trainable matrix weights; AdamW for embeddings, LM head, norms, biases, vectors, scalars, and non-matrix leftovers.
policy.rank2_reference: Megatron emerging optimizer default routes non-embedding/output rank-2 params to Muon and nonlinear/embedding params to Adam.
policy.torch_titan_grouped_experts: Treat rank-3 moe.experts.{w1,w2,w3} as Muon batched matrices because they are resident expert weight matrices.

warnings: TorchTitan grouped experts are rank-3 resident tensors; Megatron's current LayerWise predicate only tags rank-2 params, so TorchTitan Muon needs a batched-matrix/flattened view or explicit grouped-expert handling.
TorchTitan OptimizersContainer currently resolves one optimizer class for all param groups; this split needs mixed optimizer-class support, not only regex lr/weight_decay overrides.

torchtitan_regex_surface.current_gap: ParamGroupConfig can override AdamW hyperparameters but cannot choose Muon for a subset while keeping AdamW for exceptions.
muon_candidate_patterns: fallback trainable rank-2 parameters after AdamW exceptions
